Connect US 20249:00 AM9:45 AM10:15 AM11:00 AM11:45 AM1:30 PM2:15 PM3:00 PM3:45 PM4:30 PM5:00 PM
keynote Tuesday, October 1, 2024 9:00 AM – 9:45 AM· Connect US 2024

From Evolution to Revolution: The Role of Generative AI in Life & Search

Austin, Texas

Speaker

A.J. Ghergich

VP Consulting Services, Botify

VP of Consulting Services at Botify. Argues we've leapt past Level 4 AI reasoning faster than anyone predicted — and brands that wait will be left behind. Empowerment over doom is his core message.

LinkedInOpen profile

Abstract

We've leapt to Level 4 PhD-reasoning AI faster than the industry predicted. Brands that wait will be steamrolled — empowerment over doom.

Suggested takeaways

  • →Act now — inaction is the real risk
  • →Customer intent hasn't changed; only the interfaces did
  • →AI is happening because of us — we direct it
